name: nuxt-cmdk
description: Command palette + keyboard shortcut registry for Nuxt — async actions, multi-step sequences (g d), fuzzy search, scoped CSS theming.

scripts.dev: nuxt-module-build build --stub && nuxt-module-build prepare && nuxi dev playground
scripts.dev:prepare: nuxt-module-build build --stub && nuxt-module-build prepare && nuxi prepare playground
